zh.Smallburgh, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯馬爾包
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe於1370年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯馬爾包。他於1389年與Sibilla St Omer結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年在英國英格蘭享年17歲。

zh-hans.Smallburgh, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯馬爾包
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe于1370年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯馬爾包。他于1389年与Sibilla St Omer结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年在英国英格兰享年17岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree or in an area where willow trees grew, from Middle English wythe (Old English withthe). Alternatively, a variant of White or Wight .

History: American bearers of the surname Wythe trace their ancestry to Thomas Wythe, who emigrated from England to VA in 1680. One of his descendants was the statesman and jurist George Wythe (1726–1806), mentor of Thomas Jefferson and one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: With
meanings: German: from a short form of a Slavic personal name based on the Old Slavic element vit ‘mighty, powerful’ (see Wit ).

nameMeanings.name: Withe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

History: American bearers of the surname Wythe trace their ancestry to Thomas Wythe, who emigrated from England to VA in 1680. One of his descendants was the statesman and jurist George Wythe (1726–1806), mentor of Thomas Jefferson and one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe was born in 1370, in Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Sibilla St Omer in 1389. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1387, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 17.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe est né en 1370, à Smallburgh, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Sibilla St Omer en 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1387, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 17 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe wurde 1370 in Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1389 Sibilla St Omer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1387 im Alter von 17 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe è nato il nel 1370 nel Smallburgh, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Sibilla St Omer nel 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1387, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 17 anni.

ja.Smallburgh, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスマルブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Witheは1370年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスマルブルグで生まれた。1389年にSibilla St Omerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年にイギリスイギリスで17歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe(은)는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스몰버그h에서 태어났다. 그는 1389년 Sibilla St Omer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드에서 17세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Wythe Withe родился в 1370 г. в местности смаллбург, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla St Omer в 1389 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1387 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 17 лет.
